# Story 6.4: BE — Stores/Me + Tables/Status + Orders DTO Patch

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-25. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As a cashier / admin,
I want endpoint để biết store đang ở mode nào, và endpoint để xem trạng thái bàn realtime,
so that FE quyết định render floor-plan hay counter UI; floor-plan refresh trạng thái mỗi 30s.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Given authenticated user gọi `GET /api/v1/stores/me`, when role là cashier hoặc admin, then trả 200 với store hiện tại scoped theo JWT tenant/store: `{ id, name, tableMode: boolean, ... }`; tối thiểu có `id`, `name`, `code`, `tableMode`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`; KHÔNG leak `tenantId`.

2. Given `GET /api/v1/tables/status`, when authenticated cashier hoặc admin gọi, then trả 200 array lightweight `[{ tableId, status, activeOrderCount }]` cho tất cả active tables trong store hiện tại, sort theo `sortOrder ASC, name ASC`; `status` chỉ gồm `'empty' | 'occupied' | 'pending_sync'`.

3. Given status derivation, when backend hiện chỉ biết synced orders, then derive:
   - `empty` = không có order non-void với `orders.table_id = table.id` và `orders.synced_at >= today_open`.
   - `occupied` = có `activeOrderCount >= 1` synced order trong ngày chưa void.
   - `pending_sync` là contract reserved cho FE/offline semantics nhưng backend MVP không có server-side pending rows; không invent `OrderStatus`. Chỉ trả `pending_sync` nếu có dữ liệu server-side thật trong tương lai. Story 6.4 hiện trả `empty` hoặc `occupied` từ DB.
   - `activeOrderCount` là count orders cùng tenant/store/table, `syncedAt >= start-of-day Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh converted to UTC`, và `voids: { none: {} }`.

4. Given performance requirement, when store có <=50 bàn, then `/tables/status` dùng aggregate/count pattern gọn (không N+1 per table nếu tránh được), payload <5KB, không include tên bàn/area/order details; FE join với `/tables` list.

5. Given `POST /api/v1/orders` payload mở rộng, when client gửi `tableId` và `tableNameSnapshot`, then DTO accept optional nullable fields:
   - `tableId?: string | null` validated UUID when non-null.
   - `tableNameSnapshot?: string | null` string 1–100 chars when non-null.
   - Swagger example includes table fields.

6. Given table fields pair validation, when exact một trong `tableId` hoặc `tableNameSnapshot` non-null, then return 400 RFC 7807 `type=https://pos.example/errors/validation`, `detail="tableId và tableNameSnapshot phải cùng null hoặc cùng non-null"`. Missing fields are treated as null for pair validation.

7. Given order sync with `tableId` non-null, when `POST /api/v1/orders` is new (not idempotent replay), then server validates table belongs to current tenant+store via scoped table lookup; nonexistent/cross-store/cross-tenant table returns 400 validation without leaking existence.

8. Given valid order sync with table fields, when persisting order, then `orders.table_id = tableId` and `orders.table_name_snapshot = tableNameSnapshot` are stored from payload exactly; do not re-query table name and do not mutate snapshot later (AR24).

9. Given quick-counter or counter-service order, when table fields are missing or both null, then order sync still succeeds with `orders.table_id = null` and `orders.table_name_snapshot = null`; do not require `tableMode=true` on server for nullable orders.

10. Given idempotent replay, when resend same `clientOrderId`/`deviceId` with different `tableId` or `tableNameSnapshot`, then existing `sync_log` replay wins before create; response returns `idempotent_replay: true` with original `orderId`; composite key remains `(tenantId, storeId, deviceId, clientOrderId)` and does NOT include table fields.

11. Given RBAC, when cashier calls `GET /stores/me`, `GET /tables/status`, or `POST /orders`, then allowed; admin also allowed. Unauthenticated returns existing auth Problem Details; missing tenant context returns forbidden/missing context per existing pattern.

12. Given Swagger/OpenAPI, when viewing `/api/docs`, then `StoresController`/`TablesController`/`OrdersController` document new endpoints and DTO fields with bearer auth, response examples, and validation examples.

13. Given unit tests, when run `npm test -- --runInBand src/tables src/orders`, then cover stores/me response, table status derivation, empty vs occupied, void exclusion, today boundary, table pair validation, cross-store table validation, nullable quick-counter order, persist snapshots, and idempotent replay ignoring changed table fields.

14. Given regression gates, when run from `pos-api/`, then PASS: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test -- --runInBand src/tables src/orders`, `npm test`, `npm run build`.

15. Given existing admin order list/detail responses, when Story 6.4 persists table fields, then do not change admin order response shape unless tests already expect it; table display in admin/receipt is deferred to later FE brownfield stories.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Add store current endpoint (AC: 1, 11, 12)
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/stores.controller.ts` with `@Controller('stores')`, `@Get('me')`, `@Roles('cashier','admin')`, `JwtAuthGuard`, `RolesGuard`, `@ApiTags('stores')`, `@ApiBearerAuth()`.
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/stores.service.ts` with `getCurrentStore(context)`. Do not name it `store-config.service.ts` yet because Story 6.6 owns toggle/update behavior.
  - [x] NEW/extend repository method to fetch scoped store by `context.storeId`, selecting `id`, `name`, `code`, `tableMode`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` only.
  - [x] Wire controller/service/provider into existing `TablesModule`; do not create a separate module for MVP.

- [x] Add table status endpoint (AC: 2, 3, 4, 11, 12)
  - [x] Extend existing `pos-api/src/tables/tables.controller.ts` with `GET /api/v1/tables/status` before `GET /api/v1/tables/:id` if any is later added; current controller has only collection GET so no route conflict today.
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/table-status.service.ts` (flat file preferred for consistency) with `listStatus(context)`.
  - [x] Extend `TablesRepository` or add `TableStatusRepository` to list active tables and aggregate active orders since start of day Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh. Recommended efficient Prisma approach: fetch active table ids once, then `order.groupBy({ by:['tableId'], where:{ tenantId, storeId, tableId:{ in: ids }, syncedAt:{ gte: todayStartUtc }, voids:{ none:{} } }, _count:{ _all:true } })`; map missing counts to `empty`.
  - [x] Return shape `{ tableId, status, activeOrderCount }`; no `tableName`, `areaId`, or order details.
  - [x] Reuse Story 6.3 day-boundary logic (`UTC+7`, no DST) but consider exporting a small utility only if it avoids duplication without broad refactor.

- [x] Patch SyncOrder DTO (AC: 5, 6, 12)
  - [x] Edit `pos-api/src/orders/dto/sync-order.dto.ts`: add `tableId?: string | null` with `@ApiPropertyOptional({ format:'uuid', nullable:true })`, `@ValidateIf((_, v) => v !== null && v !== undefined)`, `@IsUUID()`.
  - [x] Add `tableNameSnapshot?: string | null` with nullable Swagger, `@ValidateIf`, `@IsString`, `@IsNotEmpty`, `@MaxLength(100)`.
  - [x] Update `syncOrderExample` to include a table-service example (`tableId`, `tableNameSnapshot`) while keeping nullable quick-counter allowed in notes/examples.

- [x] Patch OrdersService validation (AC: 6, 7, 9, 10)
  - [x] In `syncOrder`, keep existing order: context → idempotency key match → totals validation. Then check replay before table lookup so idempotent resend with changed table does not fail cross-store validation.
  - [x] Add pair validation after replay miss: normalize `undefined` to `null`; if exactly one non-null, throw validation with exact Vietnamese detail in AC6.
  - [x] If `tableId` non-null, validate table belongs to current tenant/store via repository method before create.
  - [x] Do not validate against `store.tableMode`; server must accept nullable orders for quick-counter/counter-service and table orders when FE chooses table.

- [x] Patch OrdersRepository persist (AC: 8, 9, 10)
  - [x] Add `tableId: body.tableId ?? null` and `tableNameSnapshot: body.tableNameSnapshot ?? null` to `tx.order.create` data.
  - [x] Add repository method `tableExists(context, tableId, client?)` in `OrdersRepository` (recommended) to avoid coupling `OrdersModule` to `TablesModule`; implementation should use scoped `table.findFirst({ where: { id: tableId, tenantId, storeId }, select:{ id:true } })`.
  - [x] Ensure idempotency unique targets unchanged; do not edit Prisma schema/migrations.

- [x] Unit tests (AC: 11)
  - [x] `src/tables`: stores/me controller/service tests; table-status service tests for empty, occupied, voided exclusion, boundary date, multi-tenant scoped calls; controller roles metadata.
  - [x] `src/orders`: DTO validation for nullable/invalid table fields; service pair validation; table lookup validation; create data includes table fields; quick-counter null succeeds; replay returns before validation/lookup.
  - [x] Update module tests for new providers.

- [x] Regression Gates (AC: 14)
  - [x] From `pos-api/`: run and record `npm run typecheck`.
  - [x] Run and record `npm run lint`.
  - [x] Run and record `npm test -- --runInBand src/tables src/orders`.
  - [x] Run and record `npm test`.
  - [x] Run and record `npm run build`.

## Dev Notes

### Source Requirements

- Story source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md` Story 6.4 — `/stores/me`, `/tables/status`, orders DTO `tableId?`/`tableNameSnapshot?`, table ownership validation, idempotency unchanged.
- Sprint Change Proposal: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/sprint-change-proposal-2026-05-25.md` — Story 6.4 estimate 5–7h; endpoint table; payload rules; conflict offline accepted; dependency order 6.1 → 6.2/6.3/6.4.
- Architecture: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` — endpoints `/api/v1/tables/status` and `/api/v1/stores/me`; sync payload sample; table fields nullable; `tableId` not in idempotency key.
- Project context: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` — NestJS 11, Prisma 7.8, RFC 7807 via `ProblemDetailsFilter`, tenant scope extension, camelCase API fields, no raw unscoped SQL.

### Current Code State (must preserve)

- Story 6.1 is done: Prisma `Store.tableMode`, `Area`, `Table`, `Order.tableId`, and `Order.tableNameSnapshot` already exist. Do not create migrations in Story 6.4.
- Story 6.2 is done: `TablesModule` exists and is imported by `AppModule`; flat files under `pos-api/src/tables/` are the established convention.
- Story 6.3 is done: `TablesController`, `TablesService`, `TablesRepository`, DTOs, tests exist. `GET /api/v1/tables` already allows cashier/admin. `TablesRepository.countActiveOrdersForToday()` already counts non-void orders for a single table using `syncedAt >= todayStartUtc` and `voids: { none: {} }`.
- Existing `OrdersService.syncOrder()` currently checks replay before create and has idempotency P2002 recovery. Preserve this behavior and place table validation after replay miss.
- Existing `SyncOrderDto` has class-validator + Swagger decorators but no table fields yet. ValidationPipe is global; use decorators rather than manual shape parsing where possible.
- Existing backend has no `OrderStatus` enum and no pending server queue table. Do not invent statuses or add schema.

### Architecture Guardrails

- **Layering:** Controller → Service → Repository → PrismaService. Keep table status and store lookup business logic out of controllers.
- **Multi-tenant:** every store/table/order lookup must be scoped by tenant/store. Existing `runWithTenantContext` + `$extends(tenantScopeExtension)` pattern is acceptable; also include explicit `tenantId/storeId` in aggregate where clauses when clarity matters.
- **RFC 7807:** errors should throw Nest exceptions with payload `{ type, title, detail }`; do not return `{ success, message, code }`.
- **Snapshot immutability:** persist `tableNameSnapshot` exactly from payload. Do not fetch current table name to overwrite it, because later table rename must not change old receipts.
- **Idempotency:** table fields are not part of idempotency. Replay lookup must happen before table existence validation for resends.
- **No frontend work:** this is backend-only. Do not implement FE floor plan, session store, or admin toggle page.
- **No table locking:** MVP accepts two POS devices using same table offline; status is informational.

### Existing Files Being Modified — Current State / Required Change / Preserve

- `pos-api/src/tables/tables.controller.ts`
  - Current: CRUD routes for `/tables`, cashier/admin list, admin mutations, Swagger examples.
  - Change: add `GET status` returning table statuses, likely delegating to `TableStatusService`.
  - Preserve: existing CRUD route behavior, roles, DTO validation, Swagger examples, and tests.

- `pos-api/src/tables/tables.module.ts`
  - Current: imports `PrismaModule`, `AuthModule`; controllers `[AreasController, TablesController]`; providers areas + tables services/repos.
  - Change: add `StoresController`, store service/repository if created, and `TableStatusService`/repository if created.
  - Preserve: existing providers/controllers; no new module churn.

- `pos-api/src/tables/tables.repository.ts`
  - Current: table CRUD + single-table active order count; scoped client helper; `TableRecord` response shape.
  - Change: add bulk status helper or keep separate repository using same patterns. If editing here, avoid breaking existing CRUD tests.
  - Preserve: `countActiveOrdersForToday()` semantics used by delete guard.

- `pos-api/src/orders/dto/sync-order.dto.ts`
  - Current: sync payload fields for order snapshot, items/options, totals, payment method; `syncOrderExample` has no table fields.
  - Change: add nullable optional `tableId` + `tableNameSnapshot`; update Swagger example.
  - Preserve: all existing validation for totals/items/payment.

- `pos-api/src/orders/orders.service.ts`
  - Current: validates context/idempotency/totals; replay lookup before menu version/create; P2002 idempotency recovery.
  - Change: validate pair and table ownership only after replay miss; call repository create with table fields.
  - Preserve: stale menu warning, totals validation, replay behavior, idempotency conflict recovery, void/list behavior.

- `pos-api/src/orders/repositories/orders.repository.ts`
  - Current: `createOrderWithSyncLog()` creates order/items/options/syncLog transaction; admin list/detail maps do not include table fields.
  - Change: persist `tableId` and `tableNameSnapshot`; add scoped table existence helper if chosen.
  - Preserve: transaction shape, sync log creation, payment mapping, unique idempotency constraints.

### Previous Story Intelligence

- Story 6.2 chose flat `src/tables/*.ts` structure despite architecture examples with subfolders. Continue flat structure for 6.4 (`stores.controller.ts`, `table-status.service.ts`) to avoid churn.
- Story 6.3 clarified backend has no order status enum; pending/occupied semantics must be derived from synced orders + `order_voids` only. Apply the same rule here.
- Story 6.3 already uses Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh start-of-day (UTC+7, no DST). Reuse semantics exactly so delete guard and status endpoint agree.
- Recent commits: `df5e6a0` schema foundation, `b508fba` areas CRUD, `3ba553b` tables CRUD. Their patterns are the expected implementation style and gates.

### Out of Scope

- Do not change admin order list/detail DTO response shape for table display unless explicitly needed for tests; FE/admin display of table info is handled later.
- Do not implement admin store-config toggle endpoint/page for `tableMode` updates — Story 6.6.
- Do not implement FE caching/session store or POS floor-plan polling — Story 6.7.
- Do not patch Dexie/cart/receipt/buildLocalOrder FE flows — Story 6.8/6.9.
- Do not add reports by table or table occupancy locks.
- Do not add Prisma migrations/schema changes unless tests reveal Story 6.1 missing fields (it currently has them).

### Testing Notes

- Prefer focused service tests with mocked repositories for validation/branching, and controller metadata tests matching existing `areas.controller.spec.ts` / `tables.controller.spec.ts` style.
- For table status aggregate tests, assert generated repository calls include tenant/store, active tables only, `syncedAt >= todayStartUtc`, and `voids: { none: {} }`.
- For DTO nullable validation, use `plainToInstance` + `validate` as existing order tests do.
- For idempotency replay, add a test where replay exists and payload has invalid/cross-store table fields; service should return replay without table lookup.

### Review Findings

- [x] [Review][Patch] StoresService bypasses repository layer — resolved: `StoresRepository` created at `pos-api/src/tables/stores.repository.ts`; `StoresService` now injects `StoresRepository` and delegates to `repo.findCurrentStore(context)`; `PrismaService` no longer injected in `StoresService`. Direct `StoresRepository` unit tests added in `stores.controller.spec.ts`.
- [x] [Review][Patch] Table status aggregate repository lacks direct unit coverage — resolved: `pos-api/src/tables/tables.repository.spec.ts` created with 3 tests covering (a) empty table list / `order.groupBy` not called, (b) multi-tenant scoped `groupBy` call with `tenantId`, `storeId`, `tableId in [...]`, `syncedAt gte`, `voids none`, and (c) correct count mapping with null tableId filtered.
- [x] [Review][Patch] Story/BMAD artifacts not updated after implementation — resolved: `Status` set to `review`, all task checkboxes marked complete, Dev Agent Record filled, File List updated with all new/modified files.

### Completion Notes List

- Implemented `GET /api/v1/stores/me` with cashier/admin access, scoped current-store lookup, and no `tenantId` in the response.
- Implemented `GET /api/v1/tables/status` with active-table aggregate counts since Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh start of day, returning only `empty`/`occupied` for backend MVP data.
- Patched order sync DTO/service/repository to accept nullable `tableId` and `tableNameSnapshot`, enforce pair validation after idempotent replay miss, validate scoped table ownership, and persist snapshots exactly.
- Resolved Review Finding #1: `StoresRepository` created, `StoresService` now uses proper repository layer (no direct PrismaService injection in service), repository-level unit tests added in `stores.controller.spec.ts`.
- Resolved Review Finding #2: Created `tables.repository.spec.ts` with 3 dedicated unit tests for `listActiveTableOrderCounts()` covering empty-list early return, multi-tenant scoped groupBy call with void exclusion, and count mapping with null tableId filtered.
- Resolved Review Finding #3: All task checkboxes marked complete, story status set to `review`, Dev Agent Record filled, File List updated.
- Patch Round 2 — Fix A: Added `tenantId: context.tenantId, storeId: context.storeId` to `table.findMany` where clause in `listActiveTableOrderCounts` (multi-tenancy data leak fix); updated assertions in `tables.repository.spec.ts` and `table-status.service.spec.ts` to verify the scope.
- Patch Round 2 — Fix B: Changed `ForbiddenException('Missing tenant context')` to RFC 7807 Problem Details body `{ type: PROBLEM_TYPES.forbidden, title: 'Forbidden', detail: '...' }` in both `stores.service.ts` and `table-status.service.ts`; updated test assertions to verify `response.type` contains 'forbidden'.
- Patch Round 2 — Fix C: Added `isActive: true` filter to `tableExists` query in `orders.repository.ts` to prevent soft-deleted tables from being assigned to new orders.
- Patch Round 2 — Fix D: Replaced falsy `if (body.tableId)` check with explicit `if (body.tableId !== null && body.tableId !== undefined)` in `orders.service.ts`.
